primary.description: Deep Navy - Represents Authority and Trust

secondary.description: Dark Amber - Represents Justice and Hope

accent.description: Teal - Represents Healing and Medical Context

usage_rules.gradients: FORBIDDEN. Use solid, flat colors only.
usage_rules.text_contrast: All text must meet APCA standards. Use Slate-900 for main text, Slate-600 for secondary.

textures.noise: Use a subtle SVG noise overlay on the main background with 0.03 opacity.

motifs: The Redaction Bar: Use black blocks that reveal text on hover for 'sensitive' storytelling.
The Case File: Use tabbed folders and typewriter fonts for case details.
The Stamp: Use a 'stamp' visual for 'Approved' or 'Verified' statuses.
visual_enhancers.borders: Sharp, distinct borders. rounded-none or rounded-sm max. 2px border width for emphasis.
visual_enhancers.shadows: shadow-sm for cards, shadow-xl for modals. Avoid diffuse, colored shadows.

layout_strategies.grid_system: The 'Case File' Grid: Dense, information-rich layouts for dashboards. Asymmetric 'Editorial' layouts for stories.
layout_strategies.spacing: Generous padding (p-8, p-12) for reading sections. Tight, tabular spacing for data.
layout_strategies.containers: Max width 1400px. Text containers max-w-prose (65ch) for optimal readability.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground rounded-none px-8 py-3 uppercase tracking-widest font-bold hover:bg-slate-800 transition-colors
buttons.secondary: border-2 border-primary text-primary bg-transparent rounded-none px-8 py-3 uppercase tracking-widest font-bold hover:bg-slate-100 transition-colors
buttons.ghost: text-slate-600 hover:text-primary hover:bg-slate-100 rounded-none px-4 py-2

cards.style: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-none p-6 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow

inputs.style: rounded-none border-slate-300 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 focus:border-primary bg-slate-50

navigation.style: Sticky top-0 z-50 bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-slate-200

hero_section.alt: Comforting hands holding each other, representing support
hero_section.usage: Hero background or split-screen feature image. Apply grayscale filter with 20% opacity overlay of primary color.

about_section.alt: Diverse group of Indian community members
about_section.usage: About Us team or community section.

legal_context.alt: Wooden gavel on a judge's table

accessibility.contrast: Strict adherence to WCAG AA. High contrast text.
accessibility.focus_states: Visible 2px offset ring in Primary color.
accessibility.reduced_motion: Respect user settings for reduced motion.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALL FONTS: Add the Google Fonts import to index.css immediately.
2. CONFIGURE TAILWIND: Update tailwind.config.js with the specific colors and font families defined above.
3. OVERRIDE SHADCN: Go to components/ui and remove 'rounded-md' from button.jsx, card.jsx, input.jsx. Enforce 'rounded-none'.
4. LAYOUT: Build the Landing Page using the 'Split Screen' strategy with the Hero Image.
5. AUTH: Implement the JWT auth pages using the 'Card' component centered on screen with a 'Legal Document' vibe.
6. FORMS: Use the 'Input' style defined above. Add 'data-testid' to all inputs.
7. QR CODE: For the donation page, create a clean, printable-style layout.
8. DO NOT use gradients. Stick to the solid colors and white space.
